ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-24-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Continued To Feb-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Jeffrey Neal Wooley and Attorney Gilbert Jay to appear on Feb-24-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. An Order to Show Cause as to why Attorney Gilbert Jay should not be sanctioned $250 for failure to appear is set for the same date and time. The Status on Close of Estate is also continued to Feb-24-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Apr-12-2018 is admitted to probate. Jeffrey Neal Wooley is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-27-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
